[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Banner Stands](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands) 3. [Outdoor Banner Stands](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/outdoor) 4. [Deluxe Outdoor Banner Retractor](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/deluxe-outdoor-banner-retractor) 5. Deluxe Outdoor Banner Retractor Kit # Custom Deluxe Outdoor Banner Retractor with 78" x 33" Banner The Deluxe Outdoor Retractor is the perfect temporary outdoor signage solution. With a weighted durable aluminum base accented with black end caps and heavy duty removable feet for a stable footprint which includes 4 stakes to drive into the ground for added stability. The shock cord pole makes it easy to set up and take down. The Deluxe Outdoor Retractor has two retractable banners allowing you two-sided displays, or display one at a time with two different messages. Included is a high quality carrying case for easy transport. ![Deluxe Outdoor Banner Retractor with 78x33 Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/46c36f1e-ce6e-4d5a-bb5c-44b0405ecfc5.jpg) Material Choice: 13 oz Vinyl for Banner Retractors 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Banner Retractors (2) 13 oz Vinyl for Banner Retractors (2) 14 oz Blockout No Curl Vinyl for Banner Retractors Product: with Deluxe Outdoor Banner Retractor Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 78" x 33" 78" x 33" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price for Both: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Product Overview](#11645f12-a719-43da-9fb1-1adbff39a693) ## Pick a Template All Templates Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Let Us Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ This temporary outdoor banner retractor is the perfect solution for outdoor events and promotions. This retractor has a weighted base and extra wide feet, when used with the provided ground stakes this display will withstand a 15mph wind and will not run or fade from rain and snow. For best results and extended life retract banners over night and during high wind or inclement weather situations. #### [Material](#materialCollapse) ### Deluxe Outdoor Banner Retractor with 78" X 33" Banner Material With this product, you will receive the banner retractor hardware and a 78" x 33" banner. #### Matieral Option: • **13 oz Vinyl**: Our most standard banner material, rated for both indoor and outdoor use. • **14 oz No Curl Vinyl**: High quality prints with a smooth matte finish. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. [Click here to request a free sample packet of materials.](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request "Sample Packet Request") #### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse) #### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse) Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps files — with fonts converted to outlines.
